interests.lead: Curated spots near Curitiba: essentials and leisure. Distances are estimates.

interests.leadDynamic: Suggestions near {{region}}: pharmacies, grocery stores, parks and museums based on the property location.
interests.errorFallback: We could not load live suggestions for this address. Showing Curitiba reference points.

extras.lead: National emergency numbers and a direct line to the Zen team.

sos.title: Emergency (SOS)
sos.lead: If you are in immediate danger, call the public services.

zen.lead: Message us on WhatsApp for questions about the property or your stay.
zen.missingNumber: Set VITE_ZEN_SUPPORT_WHATSAPP in your environment (digits only, e.g. 5541999999999).

login.subtitleCorp: Access the dashboard with your work email.
login.subtitleSignUp: Create your account with email and password to access the dashboard.
login.subtitleGuest: Paste the booking URL (the “reserve” query) or the short code (e.g. IU08J). The app’s API is not the /i/account-overview/ web page.
login.reservationStaysHint: You can paste the URL: we read ?reserve= (e.g. IU08J). The API base is VITE_STAYS_BASE_URL (…/external/v1), not the site’s /i/… page.
login.errorReservationRequired: Please enter the Stays reservation access code.
login.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

guestMagicLogin.title: Guest access
guestMagicLogin.subtitle: Signing in with your reservation code…
guestMagicLogin.missingCode: Reservation code missing from the URL.
guestMagicLogin.adminMustLogout: Sign out of the admin account to open this link. You can then sign in again with the reservation code.

dashboard.lead: Your digital stay guide in one place: reservation, property access, Wi‑Fi and service requests.

reservation.title: Your reservation
reservation.lead: Address, unit, dates, Wi‑Fi and access instructions — everything you need for your stay.
reservation.cardCodeMeta: Same id/access code you used to sign in to the app (Stays back office).

aboutProperty.title: About the Apartment
aboutProperty.lead: Essential information to arrive and access the property during your stay.
aboutProperty.staysCustomFieldsLead: Information configured in Stays for this unit.

zenCurated.lead: Tips and visual references prepared by the team for this unit.
zenCurated.garagePhotosHint: Visual reference for the parking spot and garage access.

garageVideo.title: Garage Spot
garageVideo.description: See the entry and exit flow for the garage to avoid confusion during access.

elevators.title: Elevators
elevators.description: Use the social elevator to reach the apartment. The service elevator should only be used for moving, large loads, or maintenance.

items.washer: Washer-dryer available in the service area.

items.quietHours: Respect quiet hours between 10 PM and 8 AM for neighbors' comfort.
items.visitors: Visitors should be communicated to the front desk in advance.
items.smoking: Smoking is not allowed inside the apartment.
items.care: When leaving, turn off AC and lights, and check doors/windows.

internalRules.title: Internal Rules
internalRules.summary: General rules for safety and coexistence.
internalRules.details: Maintain respectful behavior in all building areas. Avoid excessive noise, keep common spaces preserved, and follow front-desk guidance. If you have questions about specific permissions, contact building management.

commonAreas.title: Common Areas
commonAreas.summary: Guidelines for elevators, lobby, and shared spaces.
commonAreas.details: Use elevators and hallways responsibly and do not block passages. Children must be supervised by a responsible adult in common areas. Do not leave personal items in shared spaces.

wasteDisposal.title: Waste Disposal
wasteDisposal.summary: How to separate and dispose of waste properly.
wasteDisposal.details: Separate recyclables from organic waste whenever possible. Use properly closed bags and dispose only at designated building collection points. Do not leave trash in hallways, stairs, or the garage.

garageRules.title: Garage Rules
garageRules.summary: Proper use of parking spots and internal circulation.
garageRules.details: Park only in the space assigned to your unit. Respect speed limits and watch for pedestrians. Blocking maneuvering areas, other parking spots, or emergency access routes is not allowed.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.lead: Quick answers for the most common stay questions.

quietHours.question: What are the quiet hours?
quietHours.answer: Recommended quiet hours are from 10 PM to 8 AM. During this time, avoid loud music, dragging furniture, or any noise that may disturb neighbors.

pets.question: Are pets allowed?
pets.answer: Yes, as long as pets are supervised and on a leash in common areas. The owner is responsible for immediate cleaning and preventing disturbances.

parties.question: Can I host parties in the apartment?
parties.answer: Small gatherings are allowed with common sense. Events with loud sound, excessive traffic, or neighborhood impact are not permitted.

poolUse.question: How does pool access work?
poolUse.answer: Follow the condominium schedule and pool rules. Children must be accompanied and glass containers are not allowed in wet areas.

gymAccess.question: Is there a gym in the building?
gymAccess.answer: When available, gym access must follow operating hours and equipment safety rules. Please sanitize equipment after use.

deliveries.question: How do I receive deliveries?
deliveries.answer: Deliveries must follow front-desk procedures. Always provide the correct unit number to simplify identification and pickup.

visitors.question: Can visitors enter freely?
visitors.answer: Visitor entry depends on the front-desk identification policy. Prior authorization or phone/intercom confirmation may be required.

barbecueBooking.question: How do I book the barbecue area or lounge?
barbecueBooking.answer: When available, reservations must follow building management rules, be made in advance, and comply with time limits.

maintenance.question: What should I do if maintenance is needed?
maintenance.answer: Issues inside the apartment should be reported in the app services section. Urgent common-area issues must be reported to the front desk immediately.

emergency.question: What should I do in emergencies?
emergency.answer: In medical or safety emergencies, call public emergency services (911 in your region) and notify the front desk. Stay calm and follow local guidance.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.lead: Centralized control of guest access windows and requested services.

create.errorRequired: Fill in all required fields to generate access.
create.errorDateRange: End date must be the same as or later than start date.
create.success: Access generated successfully. Guest added to the overview.

services.pendingEmpty: No pending services at the moment.

servicesPage.title: Services
servicesPage.lead: Request services during your stay. Your history is saved to your account.
servicesPage.leadAdmin: Create, edit, and remove catalog items. Guests see this list in the guest app and place requests there.
servicesPage.sectionHistoryLead: Each request and its current status.
servicesPage.sectionHistoryLeadAdmin: All requests from all guests (updates in real time).
servicesPage.historyAria: Requests table: service, status and date
servicesPage.historyEmpty: No requests yet. Pick a service above to create your first one.
servicesPage.errorListen: Could not load history. Check your connection and Firestore rules.
servicesPage.errorCatalogListen: Could not load the catalog. Check your connection and Firestore rules.
servicesPage.errorCreate: Could not submit the request. Please try again.
servicesPage.errorFreeService: This service has no price set. Please contact the front desk.
servicesPage.paymentSuccess: Payment confirmed! Your request was registered and will appear in your history shortly.
servicesPage.errorUpdate: Could not mark as complete. Please try again.
servicesPage.errorDelete: Could not delete the request. Please try again.
servicesPage.whatsappMessage: Hello, I am at {{property}} and would like to request {{service}} for {{price}}. My name is {{name}} and my reservation code is {{reservationCode}}.
servicesPage.hint: Payment is completed in the app (PIX or one-time card charge). Your request is only created after payment is confirmed.

admin.sectionManage: Service catalog (guests use this list to place requests)
admin.hint: Create or edit services with title, description, price, and WhatsApp. The number (country + area + number) opens the right chat when a guest requests the service. If left empty, WhatsApp opens with only the prefilled message.
admin.whatsappHint: Only digits are stored (up to 15). With at least 10 digits, the guest’s request opens directly to this number.
admin.confirmDeleteLead: Are you sure you want to remove this service from the catalog?
admin.confirmDeleteHint: Existing requests in history keep the name stored on the request.
admin.catalogEmpty: The catalog is empty. Add the first service above.
admin.errorSave: Could not save. Check your connection and try again.
admin.errorPermission: No admin permission in Firestore. Sign out, sign in again, and ensure users/{uid} has role "admin".
admin.confirmDeleteOffer: Remove this service from the catalog? (Existing requests in history keep the name stored on the request.)

mediaModal.unsupported: This media could not be displayed.

guestNotifications.empty: No completed requests yet. When a request is completed, it will appear here.

adminDashboard.title: Admin dashboard
adminDashboard.lead: Near real-time metrics from Firestore (requests, guest links) and Stays (stays, listings). Use Refresh to clear the Stays client cache.

kpi.guestsHint: Active links whose reservation is within the stay window (Stays).
kpi.qualityHint: Listings without Zen garage photos or with Wi‑Fi still placeholder after heuristics.
kpi.magicHint: Share of active links with at least one recorded access (magic link / login).

adminDashboard.chartSubtitle: Auto-classified from service name; filtered by the period above.

adminServices.title: Services area
adminServices.lead: Manage the catalog guests see under “Services”: create and edit prices, copy, and the WhatsApp destination for each offer.

adminOrders.title: Service requests
adminOrders.lead: All extra service requests from guests. Mark as completed when the work is done.
adminOrders.confirmDelete: Delete the request for «{{serviceName}}» from {{guestName}}? This cannot be undone.
adminOrders.error: Could not load the list. Check your connection and Firestore rules.

adminProperties.title: Stays catalog & curation
adminProperties.lead: Properties from the Stays API. Open a card to add photos and notes for the Zen Guide (Firestore).
adminProperties.empty: No properties listed. Check the Stays API or import by ID.

adminPropertyEdit.garageVideoHint: Optional. Guests see this video on the «Garage Spot» card with the built-in player.
adminPropertyEdit.garageVideoInvalid: Enter a valid YouTube or Vimeo link, or leave the field empty.
adminPropertyEdit.dropHint: Drag images, click the dashed area, or use Attach (JPG, PNG or WEBP, max 5 MB). In Storage they are grouped per listing under garage or elevator folders.
adminPropertyEdit.uploadUnsupported: Unsupported format. Use JPG, PNG or WEBP.

adminAccess.title: Reservation ↔ property links
adminAccess.pageLead: Associate the Stays reservation code with the correct property ID and keep this list up to date.
adminAccess.listLead: Stays reservation codes linked to a property so the guest app loads Zen curation for that unit.
adminAccess.activityStale: No session in the last 24 hours
adminAccess.editReservationDuplicate: A link with that code already exists.
adminAccess.empty: No links yet. Create one above.

adminCreateAccess.title: Create manual access
adminCreateAccess.lead: Connect the Stays reservation code to the correct property. The guest will see that unit’s curated photos and notes after sign-in. Choose which Stays custom fields appear in the guest app.
adminCreateAccess.validation: Enter the code and choose a property.
adminCreateAccess.errorPermission: Firestore permission denied. Make sure your user has `role: "admin"` in `users/{uid}` and you are signed in.
adminCreateAccess.visibilityTitle: Custom fields visible to the guest
adminCreateAccess.visibilityLead: Each switch maps to a Stays API custom field for this listing. Turn off anything that should not appear in the guide (Wi‑Fi, passwords, instructions, etc.).
adminCreateAccess.noCustomFields: This listing returned no custom fields from the API. The link will be saved without a visibility map.
adminCreateAccess.propertyHint: Open the catalog to pick the property linked to this reservation.
adminCreateAccess.noProperties: No properties found. Check the API or import listings under “Properties”.
adminCreateAccess.directLinkLead: Send this URL to the guest: it opens reservation details directly (same Stays sign-in under the hood).
